name: Aman Gear Oil
shortDesc: Versatile gear oil for a wide range of automotive and industrial gear systems.
description: The Bagani Aman Gear Oil is a versatile, general-purpose gear lubricant suitable for a wide range of automotive and industrial gear systems. An economical choice for everyday gear lubrication needs.
description2: Proudly made in the Philippines — Gawang Pilipino, Para sa Pilipino!

features.title: Versatile Application
features.desc: Suitable for a wide range of gear systems in automotive and industrial use.

features.title: Economical Choice
features.desc: Cost-effective gear lubrication without compromising quality.

features.title: Wear Protection
features.desc: Protects gear teeth from wear and scoring during operation.

faqs.q: What makes this different from Aman Deep?
faqs.a: Aman Gear Oil is a general-purpose lubricant for basic gear needs, while Aman Deep products have specific SAE ratings and GL-4 certification for more demanding applications.

faqs.q: Can I use this in any gearbox?
faqs.a: It's suitable for most general gear applications. For specific requirements (like GL-4 or GL-5), check if Aman Deep 90 or 140 is a better fit.

faqs.q: Where can I buy Bagani products?
faqs.a: Bagani oils are available at authorized shops, auto parts stores, and online marketplaces across the Philippines.
